name: super-ralph
description: Project-agnostic design-first autonomous development. Auto-generates .claude/super-ralph-config.md on first use. 6-phase SADD pipeline with context-budget enforcement; 5-phase story-execution state machine; release-flow for finalise + promotion. Thin commands + lean skills + rich references architecture throughout. Requires ralph-loop and superpowers plugins; pr-review-toolkit and claude-in-chrome optional — see README.
